justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent consistently and accurately interpreted all temporal expressions provided by the user throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered to check other times on the same day or a different day, but did not proactively suggest a range of available slots until the user explicitly asked for flexibility.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made a slightly redundant API call in Turn 6 by checking for a specific time range after already providing all available slots for that day.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation felt somewhat tiring due to the agent's inability to proactively offer suitable alternatives, leading to multiple turns of the user having to guide the search.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained context well throughout the conversation, even when the user changed their preferred day and week multiple times.

overall_notes: The agent successfully booked an appointment, but the process was prolonged due to its reactive approach to suggesting available times rather than proactively offering a wider range of options when initial requests were unavailable.
